paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.65, with an 8.66% increase from the prior close and a -25.86% change over a 21-session window.

Recent news headlines include announcements of the company's second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, as well as reports on the departure of CEO Toby Neugebauer and the resignation of director Miles Everson due to governance concerns.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A filing disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson, as well as filings related to the issuance of convertible senior notes due 2031. There has been one Form 4 filing and no Form 144 filings.
